executionSteps.humanAction: Start from the operator index before opening other first-reviewer files.
executionSteps.gate: Index is not write permission, approval, release, or readiness.

executionSteps.humanAction: Use this as the printable day-of-review sequence and hard-stop checklist.
executionSteps.gate: Runbook is not real notes, write permission, approval, release, or readiness.

executionSteps.humanAction: Keep the runbook misuse negative cases passing before using the runbook in review preparation.
executionSteps.gate: Runbook cannot become notes, approval, release, grade promotion, launch readiness, or production readiness.

executionSteps.humanAction: Use the dossier as a read-only handoff packet for the first 12 lesson cards and gate sequence.
executionSteps.gate: Dossier cannot create notes, approvals, release candidates, or readiness claims.

executionSteps.humanAction: Use the temporary-file control to verify complete notes can become separate-approval candidates only.
executionSteps.gate: Positive control is not real reviewer evidence and cannot auto-approve or publish lessons.

executionSteps.humanAction: Use the temporary drill to verify approval-review candidates remain blocked from release, launch, grade promotion, and production readiness.
executionSteps.gate: Drill is not real reviewer evidence, approval, release, or readiness.

executionSteps.humanAction: Use the temporary drill to validate sourceFitNotes boundaries for BEA, BLS, CFTC, and SEC candidate rows.
executionSteps.gate: Drill is not real source confirmation, approval, release, or readiness.

executionSteps.humanAction: Use the temporary simulator to rehearse completion, evidence intake, separate approval, and release-drift guards after a future overlay exists.
executionSteps.gate: Simulator is not real reviewer evidence, approval, release, grade promotion, launch readiness, or production readiness.

executionSteps.humanAction: Use the sequence gate to confirm execution steps, operator phases, post-write commands, and packet order remain contiguous.
executionSteps.gate: Sequence gate is not real reviewer evidence, approval, release, grade promotion, launch readiness, or production readiness.

executionSteps.humanAction: Use the frozen packet to confirm every first-reviewer step has input, expected output, failure route, and forbidden actions.
executionSteps.gate: Freeze packet is not real reviewer evidence, approval, release, grade promotion, launch readiness, or production readiness.

executionSteps.humanAction: Use this page as the reviewer execution order after the operator index.
executionSteps.gate: No approval, release, or grade change.

executionSteps.humanAction: Print or open the per-lesson checklist pack for manual tracking.
executionSteps.gate: Checklist boxes are not real review notes.

executionSteps.humanAction: Confirm scope, commands, and disallowed status language.
executionSteps.gate: Keep approvalStatus:not_approved.

executionSteps.humanAction: Review 12 lessons, starting with the 2 high-risk rows.
executionSteps.gate: Do not rewrite learner-facing prose here.

executionSteps.humanAction: Classify source families before note-taking.
executionSteps.gate: Do not treat candidate sources as approved direct evidence.

executionSteps.humanAction: Confirm or downgrade the 5 direct candidates.
executionSteps.gate: Use green sources only; no yellow/red/research-only learner-facing evidence.

executionSteps.humanAction: Use the 72 blank fields as the note map.
executionSteps.gate: Do not paste generated text as real notes.

executionSteps.humanAction: Read examples for style only.
executionSteps.gate: Sample-only examples are not review evidence.

executionSteps.humanAction: Complete manual boxes before any real overlay write.
executionSteps.gate: Generated state keeps startAllowedNow:false.

executionSteps.humanAction: Preview and intentionally decide whether a human will start note-taking.
executionSteps.gate: No automatic creation; no overwrite.

executionSteps.humanAction: After real overlay creation, run the validation sequence.
executionSteps.gate: Still no approval or learner-facing release.

executionSteps.humanAction: Compare any real overlay with the blank template.
executionSteps.gate: Reject missing rows, unsafe wording, copy-risk wording, and status drift.

executionSteps.humanAction: Summarize complete notes, blockers, direct-candidate status, and candidates for separate approval review.
executionSteps.gate: Intake is triage only, not approval or release.

executionSteps.humanAction: Keep complete-note candidates behind a separate manual approval review.
executionSteps.gate: Candidate status is not approval, release, production readiness, or grade promotion.

executionSteps.humanAction: Prove approval/release/production/commercial-ready drift is rejected.
executionSteps.gate: Passing negative cases are required before any future release review.

executionSteps.humanAction: Review current blockers to internal trial, launch, and production readiness.
executionSteps.gate: Dashboard readiness is not approval, release, commercial readiness, or production readiness.

executionSteps.humanAction: Practice the 12 lesson cards, 72 note fields, and 5 direct-candidate decisions before real note-taking.
executionSteps.gate: Rehearsal is not real reviewer evidence, approval, release, or readiness.

executionSteps.humanAction: Use the blank worksheet to decide confirm, downgrade, or blocked for each direct-candidate source role.
executionSteps.gate: Generated worksheet rows are not confirmation; real sourceFitNotes are required.

executionSteps.humanAction: Use the one-page summary to compare confirm, downgrade, and block criteria before writing sourceFitNotes.
executionSteps.gate: Summary is not a decision, source confirmation, approval, release, or readiness.

executionSteps.humanAction: Print or copy the blank sourceFitNotes cards for the 5 direct candidates and leave all fields empty until real review.
executionSteps.gate: Card pack is not filled notes, source confirmation, approval, release, or readiness.

executionSteps.humanAction: Run simulated pollution cases before any future sourceFitNotes are written.
executionSteps.gate: Negative cases are not real notes, source confirmation, approval, release, or readiness.

executionSteps.humanAction: Read sample-only confirm, downgrade, and block note shapes before future human note writing.
executionSteps.gate: Positive samples are not real notes, source confirmation, approval, release, or readiness.

executionSteps.humanAction: Confirm manual prerequisites before any real sourceFitNotes entry.
executionSteps.gate: Preflight is not real notes, source confirmation, write permission, approval, release, or readiness.

executionSteps.humanAction: After future real sourceFitNotes are written, check that each note has a valid decision, source role, claim, rewrite action, and no unsafe wording.
executionSteps.gate: Acceptance controls are not real notes, approval, release, or readiness.

executionSteps.humanAction: Before any explicit write initializer, review the final manual and machine gates across start, creation, direct-candidate, sourceFitNotes, diff-audit, intake, and launch-readiness checks.
executionSteps.gate: Preflight does not create the overlay and must keep writeAllowedNow:false until a human decision exists.

executionSteps.humanAction: Use the generated lock as the final hard stop before any real overlay write command.
executionSteps.gate: Lock remains writeAllowedNow:false and cannot replace explicit human note-taking intent.

executionSteps.humanAction: Use the generated preview to separate machine-checked gates from missing human authorization before any write command.
executionSteps.gate: Preview remains writeAllowedNow:false and cannot authorize or create the real overlay.

executionSteps.humanAction: Use the one-page handoff to review pre-write commands, human authorization blockers, write-command preview, and future post-write validation order.
executionSteps.gate: Handoff remains writeAllowedNow:false and cannot authorize or create the real overlay.

executionSteps.humanAction: Run the consistency audit tying dry-run, overwrite protection, day-zero handoff, final rehearsal, authorization preview, and write locks together.
executionSteps.gate: Audit remains writeAllowedNow:false and cannot authorize or create the real overlay.

executionSteps.humanAction: After a future real overlay exists, run the strict validation order and failure routes without skipping gates.
executionSteps.gate: Command pack is future-only now and cannot prove review evidence while the real overlay is absent.

executionSteps.humanAction: Run note lint, completion audit, curriculum review, knowledge checks, browser checks, and full verify.
executionSteps.gate: Only a separate later approval review can consider readiness.

manualSignoffBoxes: A human reviewer is identified before any real notes are written.
Scope is limited to rewrite_batch_01 and rewrite_batch_05.
The 5 direct-candidate source roles are confirmed or downgraded before sourceFitNotes.
All 72 note fields start blank; generated prompts and examples are not copied as real notes.
Reviewer accepts education-only, non-production, no-advice, no-signal, no-performance, no-broker, no-automation, and no-real-money boundaries.
Real overlay write mode is intentional, and existing notes will not be overwritten.
After write mode, completion, diff audit, note lint, curriculum, knowledge, browser, and full verify gates all run before any separate approval review.
stopConditions: Stop if docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json appears without explicit human note-taking.
Stop if any generated prompt or sample is copied into real notes as evidence.
Stop if any note or status claims approval, learner-facing readiness, commercial readiness, or production readiness.
Stop if any note contains buy/sell/hold advice, trading signals, performance claims, broker/order workflow, automation, or real-money guidance.
Stop if any external source body text is copied into notes or lesson prose.
Stop if yellow, red, or research_only sources are proposed as learner-facing evidence.
boundary: This bundle is a human reviewer execution index only. It does not create docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json, fill human notes, approve lessons, publish learner-facing content, change lesson grades, certify commercial readiness, provide trading advice, imply performance, connect brokers, automate trading, or guide real-money decisions.
